scenarios.name: Terminal section renders on the homepage when the latest decision has a winner
Terminal section sits between the How It Works section and Garden Stats
Candidate count in terminal output matches decision.candidates.length
Feedback count line matches feedback-digest summary.totalItems when feedback exists
Terminal title bar renders exactly three decorative dots
Terminal body uses the mono font stack and highlights the winner line
Section hides instead of rendering placeholder content when decision data is missing
Long winner titles wrap on mobile without introducing horizontal page overflow
